channel.title: Sections on Devis Decet
channel.description: Recent content in Sections on Devis Decet

item.description: I am a Ph.D. Candidate in Economics at Northwestern University. My research interests lie at the intersection of Development Economics and Political Economy. In my research I use large surveys, administrative and geospatial data to investigate issues on state capacity, conflict and child labour. Curriculum Vitae, Twitter, LinkedIn Email: ddecet@u.northwestern.edu
